githubDetails.title: Device Request - [PIR Motion Brightness] - [_TZE284_bquwrqh1] / [TS0601]
githubDetails.response:
### Device Support Analysis for TS0601

#### Fingerprint Support
The device with manufacturer ID `_TZE284_bquwrqh1` is indeed supported. The driver that handles this device is `presence_sensor_radar`. This driver is specifically designed for motion sensors that utilize radar technology.
